rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that the updated module docstring in Quadratic.lean (lines 6-9 of diff) inaccurately claims the new finrank lemmas 'combine the normal form with ... scalar restriction', when the shown implementations (finrank_adjoin_simple_eq_two_of_sq_mem_notMem using minpoly/dvd, finrank_sup_adjoin_simple_eq_mul_two using mul_finrank+restrictScalars_adjoin_eq_sup) make no reference to mem_sup_adjoin_sq or exists_add_mul_of_mem_sup_adjoin_sq. Acting on it improves the PR's documentation accuracy; Review 1's 'accurate' verdict would leave the misleading text in place.
